__fixture__.name: large_file_degraded_beta
__fixture__.scenario: Beta source editor in large-file mode disables minimap, overview ruler, and the gutter rail. Degraded-state messages name the mode and Problems, Search, Review, and Outline remain reachable through keyboard routes.

multi_cursor.unsupported_note: Multi-cursor edits are disabled in large-file mode; reviewed range writes remain available.
multi_cursor.accessibility_label: Single caret in large-file mode; multi-cursor editing is unavailable.

fold_summaries.label: Folding disabled
fold_summaries.accessibility_label: Folding is disabled in large-file mode; Problems and Search remain available for critical state.

breadcrumb.visible_state_note: Large-file mode disables symbol indexing; file path identity remains exact.
breadcrumb.accessibility_label: Breadcrumb file path exact, symbol path unavailable in large-file mode.

gutter.degraded_state_message: Orientation aids are disabled in large-file mode; Problems, Search, Review, and Outline remain available for critical state.
gutter.accessibility_label: Gutter rail is disabled in large-file mode; Problems and Search expose diagnostic state.
